metadata.title: Kurdish American Community Association of DFW
metadata.description: Preserving Kurdish heritage and empowering the Kurdish community in the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

hero.title: Kurdish American Community Association
hero.subtitle: of Dallas-Fort Worth
hero.description: Uniting and empowering the Kurdish community through cultural preservation, education, and community services.

historical.title: Historical Kurdish Figures
historical.subtitle: Honoring the leaders and heroes who shaped Kurdish history

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To preserve Kurdish cultural heritage, support newly arrived Kurdish families, and build bridges between the Kurdish and American communities in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We are dedicated to preserving and promoting Kurdish culture while helping Kurdish families integrate into American society.
